message:
bench: add hook_latency benchmark suite for evaluate_command latency

Measures per-command evaluation latency across safe, denied, unrelated,
and long commands. Also benchmarks keyword fast-rejection and mixed
throughput. All results well under the 50ms p99 target — most commands
evaluate in under 100µs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -118,6 +118,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "codex_deny"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "hook_latency"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = "z"     # Optimize for size (lean binary for distribution)
 lto = true          # Link-time optimization across crates
